name: FUREN Group Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: FUREN Group Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the manufacture and distribution of pharmaceuticals in Henan Province and Shanghai, China. The company produces traditional Chinese medicines, such as capsules, tablets, granules, gels, injections, oral liquids, and others. It provides granules for heart attacks; capsules for diabetes and hyperlipidemia; and others. It is also involved in warehousing and trading businesses. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Shanghai, China.
